race.description: Racing @ Pinjarra Park Thursday June 4 Hcp (C3)
race.comment: CONCHETTA'S DREAM (11) showed plenty of promise in her debut campaign before a 3.9L defeat to end her campaign at Ascot. Her two trials this time back have been solid and this looks to shape favourably on debut. Looks a progressive type who can return on a position note. TWO TIME CHARLIE (7) is now with the Grantham stable after a 3.9L defeat at Ascot in a stronger race before the break. He hasn't been sighted publicly since then, but he was trending the right way before the break. May end up back in the run but watch for him flying late. CORNER OFF (3) finished off strongly from the back of the pack to finish 2.9L off the winner at Ascot after a disappointing run on the Scarpside here two back. CJP remains in the saddle and the good draw helps. Can feature in the finish again. GOD'S GRIN (10) was trending the right way before the break but his recent trial was only fair. Keep a close eye on him. CALL OF DUTY (4) can strike third-up with the blinkers back on.
